title: RapidMeta Oncology | Adjuvant Immunotherapy in Resected Stage III/IV Melanoma v1.0
hero_h2: Adjuvant Immunotherapy in Completely-Resected Stage III/IV Melanoma

pico.pop: Adults with completely-resected stage III (KEYNOTE-054, COMBI-AD: BRAF-mutant) or stage IIIB-IV (CheckMate-238) cutaneous melanoma, ECOG 0-1, no prior systemic therapy
pico.int: Adjuvant immunotherapy: pembrolizumab 200 mg IV Q3W x 18 cycles (KEYNOTE-054), nivolumab 3 mg/kg IV Q2W x 1 year (CheckMate-238), or BRAF/MEK inhibitor combination dabrafenib + trametinib x 1 year (COMBI-AD; BRAF V600E/K-mutant only)
pico.comp: Placebo (KEYNOTE-054, COMBI-AD) or ipilimumab 10 mg/kg IV (CheckMate-238) -- pre-2018 standard adjuvant
pico.out: Recurrence-free survival (RFS; primary in all three trials, time from randomization to first recurrence or death; HR vs control)
pico.subgroup: Stage (IIIA / IIIB / IIIC / IV), BRAF status, ulceration, PD-L1 expression, lymph-node involvement, geography, age

real_data_entries.name: KEYNOTE-054
real_data_entries.group: Adjuvant pembrolizumab vs placebo, completely-resected stage III melanoma; primary endpoint RFS
real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Eggermont AM et al. NEJM 2018;378:1789-1801 (KEYNOTE-054 pembrolizumab adjuvant).

real_data_entries.name: CheckMate-238
real_data_entries.group: Adjuvant nivolumab vs ipilimumab 10 mg/kg, completely-resected stage IIIB-C / IV melanoma; primary endpoint RFS
real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Weber J et al. NEJM 2017;377:1824-1835 (CheckMate-238 nivolumab vs ipilimumab adjuvant).

real_data_entries.name: COMBI-AD
real_data_entries.group: Adjuvant dabrafenib + trametinib vs placebo, completely-resected stage III BRAF V600E/K-mutant melanoma; primary endpoint RFS
real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Long GV et al. NEJM 2017;377:1813-1823 (COMBI-AD dabrafenib + trametinib adjuvant BRAF-mutant).
